commentary:
# Exchange Liquidity Commentary – 09 Jul

NYSE maintains commanding liquidity leadership with an Amihud ILLIQ of 0.0013, roughly 98 times superior to LSE's 0.1279, underscoring North American market dominance. While Nasdaq 100 follows closely with tighter Roll spreads (1.74%), LSE's significantly elevated illiquidity metrics across all dimensions reveal structural disadvantages. European bourses demonstrate intermediate positioning, with Euronext outperforming peers, suggesting fragmented liquidity pools outside the transatlantic core.
